summary: Full frontend and backend testing completed for DanoFitness26 new features. All critical features verified: Admin Dieta AI tab showing nutrition plan users, client 'Dieta AI' tab positioned as 2nd tab after Home with colored icon, persistent banner on Home for nutrition plan signup. Both admin and client login flows work correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Tab layout correctly positions 'Dieta AI' as 2nd tab after Home in _layout.tsx
Admin panel 'pianiAI' tab correctly shows nutrition stats (profili_totali, piani_generati) and plan list
Home banner shows by default (hasMealPlan useState initialized to false) and disappears only when user has completed plan
API /api/admin/nutrition/plans returns enriched data with profile_at_generation for each plan
seed_data_creation: Admin created via POST /api/init/admin, test client exists
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working correctly: 1) Admin Dieta AI tab shows 1 profile, 1 plan (Marco Bianchi with dimagrire goal, 1649 kcal), 2) Client view has Dieta AI tab as 2nd tab with red/coral color when active, 3) Home banner 'Crea il Tuo Piano Alimentare!' visible for clients without meal plan, 4) All API endpoints tested and passing.
tests_passed: Admin login with admin@danofitness.it / DanoFitness2025! - SUCCESS
Client login with cliente@test.com / Cliente123! - SUCCESS
Client home page shows nutrition banner 'Crea il Tuo Piano Alimentare!' - VISIBLE
Client 'Dieta AI' tab visible as 2nd tab after Home - VERIFIED
Dieta AI tab has colored icon (red #FF6B6B when focused) - VERIFIED
Admin panel tabs visible: Oggi, Abbon., Insoluti, Utenti, Dieta AI, Archiviati - ALL VISIBLE
Admin Dieta AI tab shows 'Piani Alimentari AI' header - VERIFIED
Admin Dieta AI tab shows stats: 1 Profili Creati, 1 Piani Generati (2026-03) - VERIFIED
Admin Dieta AI tab shows plan list with Marco Bianchi data - VERIFIED
GET /api/admin/nutrition/plans returns profili_totali, piani_generati, mese, plans - SUCCESS
GET /api/nutrition/my-plan returns has_subscription, profile, plan, mese_corrente - SUCCESS
GET /api/lessons returns lessons with caching - SUCCESS
GZip compression middleware configured (min 500 bytes) - VERIFIED
